Here's what we covered in this module. First we talked about how testing lets you scientifically improve your funnel results. We talked about why all of your marketing decisions should be driven by testing data and not opinion. We talked about the three big elements to test and in what order, how to run a basic test with the experiments feature in Google Analytics and how to run a more advanced test with Visual Website Optimizer. Here's what to do now. First, decide what testing platform you're going to use. Then set aside time in your calendar each week to conduct a new test. As well, set time aside in your calendar each week to review your testing results.
